   ~~> reorder_product ([("Base", 8800)])
product([(M#matrix_to_atom_5_5 - 1);int(1..)])

--

product([(M#matrix_to_atom_5_5 - 1);int(1..)])
   ~~> remove_unit_vector_products ([("Base", 8800)])
(M#matrix_to_atom_5_5 - 1)

--

(M#matrix_to_atom_1_1 - 1)
   ~~> minus_to_sum ([("Base", 8400)])
sum([M#matrix_to_atom_1_1,-(1);int(1..)])
